title: calamagrostis cinnoides
intro: Calamagrostis cinnoides, also known as pinegrass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Calamagrostis cinnoides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic, making it a popular herbal remedy. Traditionally, Calamagrostis cinnoides is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by soaking the plant in a solvent like ethanol.
